title: Fantasy Cartography Studio
description: Procedural fantasy map generator with 4 render styles, rivers, towns, roads, and custom marker placement.
concept: A fully-featured map-making studio that generates unique fantasy worlds from a numeric seed. Perlin FBM noise shapes continents, archipelagos, islands, or lake-lands; rivers flow downhill from peaks to sea; settlements are scattered on habitable terrain; road networks connect nearby towns. Switch between Terrain (hillshaded biomes), Topographic (elevation contours), Political (Voronoi territories), and Parchment (ink-drawing style with mountain symbols and forest icons) views.
features: 4 render modes: Terrain (hillshaded), Topo (contour lines), Political (Voronoi territories), Parchment (cartographic ink style)
4 world shapes: Island, Continent, Archipelago, Lakes
Procedural rivers, settlements (5–16), and bezier road networks
Place custom markers (Castle, Village, Dungeon, Shrine) with names
Seed-based generation with shareable URL hash
Editable map title with italic serif overlay
localStorage persistence (seed, markers, title, view state)

interaction.mouse: Click+drag to pan, scroll wheel to zoom
interaction.click: Select marker tool then click map to place marker
interaction.touch: Drag to pan, pinch to zoom
interaction.keyboard: Type seed + Enter to generate specific map
